The land of Ammonihah] The city of Ammonihah and "every living soul of the Ammonihahites" were destroyed because they martyred the Saints and persecuted the prophets (see Alma 16:9). (Joseph Fielding Mc Conkie and Robert L. Millet, Doctrinal Commentary on the Book of Mormon, 4 vols., 3:, p.173)

A branch ... grafted into the true vine] "I AM the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman," Christ declared. "I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing. If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast them into the fire, and they are…
